query:
-- Update Torquay with coordinates
UPDATE delivery_areas 
SET latitude = '50.4619', longitude = '-3.5253', radius_meters = 3000 
WHERE area_name = 'Torquay';

-- Update Paignton with coordinates  
UPDATE delivery_areas 
SET latitude = '50.4356', longitude = '-3.5606', radius_meters = 2500 
WHERE area_name = 'Paignton';

-- Update Newton Abbot with coordinates
UPDATE delivery_areas 
SET latitude = '50.5308', longitude = '-3.6079', radius_meters = 2500 
WHERE area_name = 'Newton Abbot';
